news.headline: Greymatter.io's Greymatter platform wins PaaS Security Solution of the Year at CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards, recognizing ZTN leadership.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, Greymatter.io, a prominent zero trust networking (ZTN) firm, declared that their platform, Greymatter, has secured the title of "PaaS Security Solution of the Year" in the 8th edition of the CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards. This accolade underscores Greymatter.io's dedication to providing network, security, and IT teams with an innovative ZTN platform. The CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards, a renowned global initiative, acknowledges leading companies and technologies in the cybersecurity field.

news.headline: Graylog wins 'SIEM Innovation of the Year' in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards. It is known for being user-friendly.
news.summary: In Houston, Graylog Security has been acknowledged as a cutting-edge and user-friendly security solution for API Security. This recognition highlights its innovative approach, integration capabilities, and exceptional value proposition.

news.headline: NG911 Research Report predicts transformational growth in US public safety sector by 2028 with key industry trends and market dynamics. Business Wire, Dublin.
news.summary: A new report titled "Next Generation 911 (NG911) 2024 Edition" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the NG911 vision and its development, examining industry trends and market dynamics. Key players in the NG911 ecosystem are identified, along with their positions in the NG911 value chain. The report offers insights into an i3-compliant NG911 system, explores partnerships among ecosystem participants, and presents market metrics.

Kneat closes $35.6M bought deal, issuing 7.5M shares for the company.
news.summary: Kneat has successfully completed its previously announced bought deal by issuing a total of 7,500,000 shares. The Company generated gross proceeds amounting to $35.6 million from this offering.

news.headline: Momencio introduces new brand and features for event success, powered by AI, aiming to boost sales. PHILADELPHIA, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: momencio announced a new brand, aligning with its AI-powered event lead capture and activation features. The company, based in Philadelphia, revealed the update on Oct. 10, 2024. Known as a top platform for event lead capture, engagement, and management, momencio is focusing on boosting sales with its innovative technology.

news.headline: Frenchies Modern Nail Care collaborates with non-profit, Fighting Pretty, to host Bubbles and Beauty events for breast cancer warriors.
news.summary: A rapidly expanding national non-toxic nail salon franchise, Frenchies Modern Nail Care, has teamed up with the non-profit organization Fighting Pretty in a partnership aimed at combining pampering services with a purpose. The collaboration was revealed on October 10, 2024, in Denver. Frenchies Modern Nail Care has been experiencing significant growth in its franchise network.

news.headline: Global Logistics Forum 2024 in Riyadh partners with Ministry of Transport for event on Oct 12-14.
news.summary: The Global Logistics Forum (GLF) in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on October 10, 2024, will be convened by the Ministry of Transport and Logistic Services. As the event nears its commencement on October 12-14, partners have been disclosed to participate in enhancing the conference's impact.

news.headline: G-SHOCK introduces the first full-metal timepiece, GMCB2100, a 3-hand analog chronograph, in Dover, NJ.
news.summary: Casio America, Inc. has revealed a significant addition to its 2100 line on Oct. 10, 2024. The company introduced the first full-metal timepiece, integrating the renowned strength of G-SHOCK with a redefined sense of beauty. This new addition to the Full Metal line is represented by the GMCB2100, which is a 3-hand analog chronograph. This release marks a milestone as Casio America delves into combining durability with elegance in watches.

news.headline: High CPI won't stop Fed rate cut; surge in jobless claims; S&P 500 dips from high. Fed won't fret.  Nov. 7 cut likely.
news.summary: Despite a high consumer price index, the Federal Reserve is unlikely to change its course and lower interest rates on November 7th due to a significant increase in jobless claims. This resulted in the S&P 500 dropping from its previous record high. The CPI data showed inflation running high, but it does not seem to be a cause for concern for the Fed at this time.

news.headline: Tinicum acquires controlling interest in Tornatech, retaining co-presidents; headquarters in Laval, Quebec. Financial terms undisclosed.
news.summary: In New York, Tinicum, L.P. and affiliated funds managed by Tinicum Incorporated revealed the acquisition of a majority stake in Groupe Tornatech Inc. ("Tornatech"). Co-Presidents Marc Goupil and Dominic Bergeron will still hold a substantial ownership share in the company post-acquisition. The global headquarters of Tornatech will continue to be based in Laval, Quebec. Financial specifics of the deal were not made public. Tornatech is a prominent player in designing and producing.

news.summary: The Mid-Atlantic region saw a steady number of home sales through September similar to the previous year. Yet, an increase in new pending sales indicates a potential surge in market activity for the 4th quarter. This development hints at a positive trend in the real estate sector where prices are on the rise. This indicates a shift towards an optimistic outlook with promising growth prospects.

news.headline: Directional drilling services market to reach USD 13.5 billion by 2030, with 3.3% CAGR due to rising demand for oil and gas.
news.summary: The directional drilling services sector is witnessing notable expansion due to rising oil and gas demand and the necessity for efficient resource extraction. With conventional reserves dwindling, companies are increasingly adopting directional drilling methods to access resources. This trend has led to a considerable increase in market size, with industry experts projecting a growth rate of X% over the next five years. This surge in demand for directional drilling services is mainly attributed to the need for enhanced extraction techniques in the oil and gas sector.

news.headline: Global AI vision market to reach $43.02 billion in 2029, growing from $14.85 billion in 2024 at a CAGR of 23.7%.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the global AI vision market. The market is projected to increase from USD 14.85 billion in 2024 to a striking USD 43.02 billion by 2029, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.7% during the forecast period. This growth indicates a substantial expansion of AI vision technology across various industries.

news.headline: Susan G. Komen® raises awareness on breast cancer's impact with new videos showcasing patients' stories.
news.summary: In Dallas, Susan G. Komen®, a top breast cancer organization, is recognizing National Breast Cancer Awareness Month by shedding light on the extensive impact breast cancer has on patients, families, and loved ones. Recently unveiled videos showcase the viewpoints of children aiding their mother during stage 3 breast cancer and a young mother battling stage 4 breast cancer. The latter's hope for a future with her family hinges on advancements in research. The organization is emphasizing the urgent need for improved solutions.

This strategic alliance is focused on developing advancements in creating instantaneous results...

news.headline: New NFL heated apparel by ActionHeat transforms fans' game day experience, keeping them warm even in coldest weather.
news.summary: Cutting-edge heated clothing is changing the game for NFL enthusiasts, ensuring they stay cozy during intense games, tailgates, and chilly overtimes. With a recent debut in Philadelphia on Oct. 10, 2024, these innovative garments are equipped with technology to defy extreme temperatures and keep fans warm no matter the conditions. This advancement means fans can now fully enjoy the thrilling moments of the game without being hindered by the weather.

Businessolver® introduces Benefits Communication and Automation Engine, enhancing employee benefit marketing with new tools.
news.summary: In Denver, Businessolver® has introduced its Benefits Communication and Automation Engine for HR and benefits management. This new suite of tools goes beyond standard methods like emails and texts, offering employers innovative ways to enhance employee benefit marketing and campaigns. The platform enables personalized communication strategies, catering to employees with different needs and backgrounds. With this technology, companies can better engage employees and optimize their benefit-related efforts. Businessolver® continues to lead in SaaS-based HR and benefits technology, providing solutions for employers seeking advanced communication tools.

Ten individuals awarded $10,000 each by Metabolic Mind for mental health recovery using ketogenic therapy. Celebrating hope and resilience.
news.summary: Metabolic Mind, a nonprofit initiative of Baszucki Group based in San Mateo, California, held their Fresh Start Awards ceremony on October 10, 2024, to celebrate individuals utilizing ketogenic therapy to improve their mental health. Ten recipients were recognized for their achievements in reclaiming their well-being through this innovative approach. The event highlighted the importance of hope and resiliency in mental health recovery.

news.headline: FlexClip introduces new AI tools including AI Photo Colorizer, AI Face Swap, among others, empowering creators.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on October 10, 2024, FlexClip from PearlMountain Limited unveiled a range of advanced AI tools for its video creation platform. The suite includes the AI Photo Colorizer, AI Photo Restoration, AI Image Upscaler, AI Image Extender, and AI Face Swap. These cutting-edge tools are designed to enhance the user experience and offer new creative possibilities.

news.headline: Nationwide wins 5th consecutive DALBAR Customer Experience Excellence Award, showcasing commitment to exceptional service.
news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts on October 10, 2024, Nationwide has been recognized for its exceptional customer service, receiving the prestigious DALBAR Customer Experience Excellence Award for the fifth consecutive time. This award highlights Nationwide's commitment to delivering top-notch service to its customers.

news.headline: Italy elevators and escalators market is projected to grow by 0.89% from 2023-2029. Top 4 vendors hold 60% market share.
news.summary: A report on the Italy Elevators and Escalators market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It forecasts a CAGR of 0.89% for the market from 2023 to 2029. The top 4 vendors in Italy, Otis, KONE, Schindler, and TK Elevator, hold a collective 60% market share. Italy is ranked as the second country globally in terms of elevator and escalator market size.

news.headline: Cofense PhishMe wins Best Email Security Solution of the Year award combining AI, ML, human intelligence to stop advanced phishing threats.
news.summary: A company based in Leesburg, Virginia, Cofense®, specializing in email threat detection and response solutions, was recently awarded the title of Best Email Security Solution of the Year by the Cybersecurity Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious recognition highlights Cofense's innovative method of integrating artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and human-vetted intelligence to combat sophisticated phishing attacks that can evade traditional secure email gateways (SEGs). By leveraging the latest advancements in AI and ML technologies, Cofense has successfully developed a comprehensive approach to mitigate email-based cyber threats.

news.headline: BZI showcases commitment to Utah communities and Innovation Park at 2024 One Utah Summit on Oct 7-9.
news.summary: BZI, an OSHA-certified company based in Kanarraville, Utah, showcased its dedication to local communities and forward-thinking strategies at the One Utah Summit from October 7-9, 2024. The event highlighted BZI's innovative approach and commitment to fostering growth and development in Utah, emphasizing their contributions to the region's economic and social well-being.

news.headline: Forcura obtained HITRUST r2 Certification for its tech platform, ensuring top-level security. Platform includes MyForcura, Forcura IQ, Circle, and Analytics.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, healthcare workflow management company Forcura has announced that its entire technology platform, including MyForcura, Forcura IQ, Forcura Circle, and Forcura Analytics, has received certified status by HITRUST for information security. This certification, HITRUST r2 Certification, confirms that Forcura's technology platform meets regulatory compliance and industry-defined requirements, effectively managing risk.

news.headline: Sysdig named Company of the Year for Containers and Kubernetes Security by Frost & Sullivan. Appointed Omer Azaria as new Chief Product Officer.
news.summary: Sysdig, a prominent figure in real-time cloud security based in San Francisco, has achieved the esteemed title of "Company of the Year" for container and Kubernetes security, as awarded by Frost & Sullivan. Moreover, they have welcomed Omer Azaria as their new Chief Product Officer (CPO). Sysdig's distinction lies in its robust CNAPP, which sets it apart from competitors due to its unparalleled real-time security measures across the cloud life cycle, as stated by Daphne Dwiputr.

news.headline: Russian Deputy Foreign Minister: A new meeting of the "nuclear five" will be held in New York in the near future - RIA.
Paige's AI technology Alba, showcased by Microsoft at HLTH 2024 conference as transformative AI for healthcare.
news.summary: In New York, Paige, a top AI technology provider, revealed that Microsoft is highlighting their foundation models at the Las Vegas HLTH 2024 conference. This technology is praised as revolutionary for healthcare. Matt Lungren, MD, Microsoft Health & Life Sciences’ Chief Scientific Officer, will present during a live seminar on October 21st, discussing the impact of AI foundation models on healthcare. Paige’s CEO & CTO, Razik Yousfi, will also be a part of this presentation.

news.headline: FireMon's Policy Manager wins "Policy Management Solution of the Year" award in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards Program.
news.summary: FireMon, a top network security policy management (NSPM) company, based in Lenexa, Kansas, has been recognized for its Policy Manager solution. It has won the prestigious “Policy Management Solution of the Year” award in the 8th annual CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards program. The program was conducted by CyberSecurity Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence organization. FireMon's Policy Manager solution was chosen as the winner, highlighting its excellence in providing visibility, control, agility, and automation to enterprise cloud and hybrid network infrastructure. This recognition underlines FireMon's dedication to innovation and security in the industry.

news.headline: KAGA FEI launches ES4L15BA1 BLE module, reducing development time and certification costs for IoT products, like wearables.
news.summary: KAGA FEI Co., Ltd., a prominent supplier of short-distance wireless modules worldwide, introduced the ES4L15BA1 Bluetooth Low Energy module in Yokohama, Japan. This new module features a built-in antenna and has received multiple certifications. As a result, it streamlines the development process and lowers certification expenses for upcoming wireless IoT products like IoT devices, small healthcare products, and wearables that demand a compact design. The ES4L15BA1 module enables quicker time-to-market for these products.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks partners with Sun Life Health, saving 2 hours daily per provider with Sunoh.ai for multilingual clinical documentation.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks has revealed that Sun Life Health is effectively utilizing Sunoh.ai’s multilingual feature to improve and simplify clinical documentation of patient visits in both English and Spanish languages. By utilizing Sunoh.ai, providers can save up to two hours daily, allowing them to cater to more patients, prioritize better patient care, and reduce burnout while enhancing work-life balance. eClinicalWorks is recognized as the largest ambulatory cloud EHR platform.

Investors are eager for the announcement, hoping for results exceeding estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company's EPS missed by $0.00, leading to a 0.0% drop in share price the following day. Fastenal's stock was trading at $70.61 as of October 9, with a 16.55% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given Fastenal a consensus rating of Buy, with an average one-year price target of $73.25, indicating a potential 3.74% upside. Understanding market sentiments and industry expectations is critical for investors ahead of the earnings report.

The conference aims to feature a lineup of prominent speakers and focus on key themes. It is anticipated to be the most extensive gathering of its kind, offering a valuable networking and educational opportunity for attendees.

Investors are optimistic about surpassing estimates and upbeat guidance for the next quarter. Understanding that guidance influences stock prices is crucial. news.headline: FusionTek acquires dpe Systems, its second acquisition in a year, strengthening its IT capabilities in Seattle area.
news.summary: A Kirkland-based IT managed service provider, FusionTek, has recently acquired Seattle-based IT company, dpe Systems. This acquisition is the second within a year for FusionTek, showcasing their strategic approach in expanding their services. By targeting companies that complement their offerings, FusionTek aims to provide more comprehensive solutions to their clients. FusionTek, headquartered in the greater Seattle area, continues to strengthen its presence in the market through strategic acquisitions.

This prestigious recognition highlights the innovative approach taken by Zumigo DeRiskify in combating fraud.

Analysts predict the company will reveal an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.57. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement as expectations are high for Metropolitan Bank Holding's performance.

news.headline: Church Mutual warns organizations post-storm of contractor fraud risks, especially after Hurricanes Helene or Milton, to prevent financial losses.
news.summary: Protecting against contractor fraud is crucial for organizations with storm-related property damage. This becomes especially important post major storms like Hurricane Helene or Milton. The aftermath of such storms sees a significant rise in contractor fraud risks. Unscrupulous contractors tend to prey on vulnerable organizations by offering unsolicited repair services, putting them at risk of financial losses. It is essential to be cautious of unsolicited offers to avoid falling victim to this deceit. Stay vigilant and safeguard against potential fraud post-storm to protect your organization from incurring further losses.
